name: real-estate-plugin
description: Central Indiana real estate agent toolkit covering the full buying, selling, and transaction lifecycle within the MIBOR BLC system. Provides 19 skills for listing management, buyer consultation, offer writing, transaction coordination, market analysis, client communication, and compliance — all calibrated to Indiana law, MIBOR forms, and Central Indiana geography.

google_drive_root.description: Google Drive root folder ID for agent document storage
